scenarios.query: Add a GET /users/{id} route that returns a Pydantic User model
expected_behavior: Declares typed Path[int] extractor for the id parameter
Returns a Pydantic model instance (auto-serialized to JSON)

scenarios.query: Add a POST /items route that validates the request body as a Pydantic model and returns 201
expected_behavior: Returns (item, 201) tuple to set the status code

scenarios.query: Add a query parameter 'limit' with a default of 10 to a list endpoint
expected_behavior: Declares limit: int = 10 or limit: Query[int] = 10 in the handler signature
Does not add Path[int] for a query parameter
